description: Unified Agroverse event registry. 'upcoming' = operational events (source: each go_to_market/events/<slug>/event.json). 'past' = published cacao-circle pages (source: agroverse_shop/event-details-registration, generated by its build_events_json.py). Regenerate with build_index.py. Convention: agentic_ai_context/EVENTS.md

events.name: SF Tech Fest 2026
events.status_note: Gary missed the reply window with Soniya; snack-table serving slot is no longer available. He still has a free pass to attend as a guest. Reconnaissance mission — walk the floor, note conversations, gather signal.
events.venue: ICC, 525 Los Coches St, Milpitas, CA 95035
events.format: Pass-only attendance. No serving. Gary attends as a guest with a free pass, walks the floor, and gathers signal.

next_milestone.what: Post-event: note any conversations or observations from the floor

events.name: Onsen Global Leaders Forum 2026
events.status_note: Format set (≈20 sealed co-branded cacao-tea bags in a basket, no pour); Phase 0 pending with Tiffine (logo, table placement, registration).
events.venue: Japan Innovation Campus, Palo Alto, CA
events.format: ≈20 individually sealed cacao-tea bags in a small basket on the snack table, each label co-branded Onsen Global × Agroverse with a provenance QR. No flasks, no pour, no booth.

next_milestone.what: Confirm logo / table placement / registration with Tiffine

events.name: Dual Tech Summit 2026
events.status_note: Venue + Kirsten pre-brew confirmed; date/table/ClawCamp timing pending with Ken (check-in May 27).
events.venue: War Memorial Veterans Building, San Francisco, CA

host.name: Ken
host.org: Orbis86 / ClawCamp (SVH Capital Dual Tech Summit)

events.format: Two flasks — Oscar's ceremonial cacao + Paulo's cacao tea — 3 oz cups, poured at a table Ken provides.

next_milestone.what: Confirm date / table / ClawCamp timing with Ken
